sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Brink’s Declares Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: The Brink's Company (NYSE:BCO) announced that its board of directors declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.255 cents per share on the company's common stock. This dividend is scheduled for payment on March 2, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of February 2, 2026. Brink's is a global provider of cash and valuables management, digital retail solutions, and ATM managed services.

feed.title: East West Bancorp (EWBC) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
feed.summary: East West Bancorp (EWBC) is expected to report a year-over-year increase in earnings and higher revenues for the quarter ended December 2025. The company's upcoming earnings report on January 22 could see its stock price move based on how actual results compare to estimates. With a positive Zacks Earnings ESP and a Zacks Rank #3, East West Bancorp is likely to beat the consensus EPS estimate.

feed.title: CASI Pharmaceuticals Announces Approval of Clinical Trial Application by China NMPA for Phase 1 / 2 Study of CID-103 for Renal Allograft Antibody-Mediated Rejection (AMR)
feed.summary: CASI Pharmaceuticals has announced that the China NMPA has approved its Clinical Trial Application for a Phase 1/2 study of CID-103 for renal allograft antibody-mediated rejection (AMR). CID-103 is an anti-CD38 monoclonal antibody intended to treat AMR, a condition with no currently approved therapies that often leads to kidney transplant loss. This approval, combined with a previous U.S. FDA IND approval for a Phase 1 AMR study, marks significant progress in the company's efforts to develop a treatment for this critical unmet medical need.

feed.title: September 18th Options Now Available For Canadian Imperial Bank Of Commerce (CM)
feed.summary: New options contracts for Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce (CM) with a September 18th expiration date are now available. These contracts offer potential opportunities for option sellers to achieve higher premiums due to the extended time until expiration. Stock Options Channel's analysis highlights a particular put contract at a $90.00 strike and a call contract at a $92.50 strike, suggesting potential YieldBoost returns for investors.

feed.title: Tilray Brands (NASDAQ:TLRY) Shares Down 1.9% - What's Next?
feed.summary: Tilray Brands (NASDAQ:TLRY) shares fell 1.9% during mid-day trading to $9.71, with trading volume down 41% compared to the average session. The stock currently hovers near its 50-day moving average and below its 200-day average, holding a "Reduce" consensus rating and a $15 target price from analysts. Tilray missed quarterly EPS estimates at ($0.41) against an expected ($0.14) but exceeded revenue expectations with $217.5 million, displaying significant negative net margins and return on equity.

feed.title: Worthington Steel to buy metal processor Kloeckner in deal valued at $2.4B (WS:NYSE)
feed.summary: Worthington Steel (WS) plans to acquire metal processing firm Kloeckner & Co. in a $2.4 billion deal, which will create the second-largest steel service center company in North America. Following the announcement, Worthington Steel's stock rose 3.2% in post-market trading.

feed.title: Parker to Announce Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Earnings on
feed.summary: Parker Hannifin Corporation will release its fiscal 2026 second-quarter earnings on January 29, 2026, before the market opens. This will be followed by a conference call and webcast at 11:00 a.m. Eastern time to discuss the results and address questions from investors and analysts. The webcast will be available on Parker's investor website, with an archived replay accessible later the same day.

feed.title: Seaport Highlights LVS Strength in Singapore Amid Macau Cost Challenges
feed.summary: Seaport Research Partners highlights Las Vegas Sands Corp (LVS) strong performance in Singapore through its Marina Bay Sands property, which is outperforming expectations and dominating its market. This success provides a counterbalance to the rising operational costs and competitive pressures faced by LVS and other gaming companies in Macau. The report also details the varying performances of major Macau operators like Galaxy Entertainment, Melco Resorts, MGM China, and SJM Holdings, underscoring the importance of geographic diversification and strategic positioning in Asia's gaming industry.

feed.title: FDA Grants Orphan Drug Status to Atossa Therapeutics' (ATOS) Z-E
feed.summary: Atossa Therapeutics (ATOS) has received Orphan Drug Designation from the FDA for its drug candidate, Z-endoxifen, for treating Duchenne muscular dystrophy. This designation is a significant step for the clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, which focuses on unmet medical needs in oncology. Despite facing challenges in revenue growth and profitability, Atossa demonstrates strong financial health with no debt and high liquidity, suggesting resilience against potential setbacks.

feed.title: BriaCell Therapeutics Announces Closing of US$30 million Public Offering
feed.summary: BriaCell Therapeutics Corp., a clinical-stage biotechnology company, announced the closing of a public offering that generated approximately US$30 million in gross proceeds. The offering included 5,366,726 units, each consisting of one common share (or pre-funded warrant) and one warrant, sold at US$5.59 per unit. The net proceeds will be used for working capital, general corporate purposes, and advancing the company's business objectives.

feed.title: Customer-Funded 1.4 GW Data Center Deal Could Be A Game Changer For DTE Energy (DTE)
feed.summary: DTE Energy recently announced a fully customer-funded 1.4 GW data center power agreement, which is poised to benefit existing customers and reshape the company's investment narrative. Despite regulatory scrutiny from Michigan's Attorney General regarding the fast-track approval of data center contracts, DTE reaffirmed its 2025 EPS guidance and 2026 outlook, signaling confidence in its earnings trajectory. This development highlights both significant growth opportunities from data center demand and the ongoing risk of regulatory challenges.

feed.title: Ross, CEO of Trio Petroleum, sells $33k in shares
feed.summary: Trio Petroleum Corp's CEO, Robin A. Ross, sold 37,500 shares of common stock for approximately $33,352.50 to cover tax obligations related to restricted stock issued in 2025. Following this transaction, Ross directly owns 737,500 shares. The company also recently entered an at-the-market equity agreement with Ladenburg Thalmann & Co. Inc. to sell up to $3.6 million in common stock.

feed.title: B. Riley Adjusts Price Target on Amkor Technology to $48 From $29, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: B. Riley has adjusted its price target for Amkor Technology (AMKR) to $48 from $29, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This update reflects a significant increase in the price target, signaling a revised outlook for the semiconductor packaging and test services provider.

feed.title: Aerogel Market - Global Trends, Investment Opportunities and Growth Forecast 2025-2033 | Astute Analytica
feed.summary: The global aerogel market, valued at $1.41 billion in 2024, is projected to reach $5.88 billion by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 17.2%. This significant growth is primarily driven by the electric vehicle (EV) sector, where aerogels are crucial for thermal management, and robust demand from sustainable construction due to stringent regulatory support. North America leads the market, propelled by innovation and commercialization, with silica aerogels dominating over 67% of the market share.

feed.title: Celestica (CLS) Is Considered a Good Investment by Brokers: Is That True?
feed.summary: This article examines the reliability of brokerage recommendations for Celestica (CLS). While Celestica has an average brokerage recommendation (ABR) of 1.44, indicating a strong buy, the author cautions against relying solely on these recommendations due to potential positive bias from brokerage firms. Instead, the article suggests validating the ABR with the Zacks Rank, a proprietary stock rating tool based on earnings estimate revisions, noting that Celestica currently holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold).

feed.title: Trailblazer Merger Corp I amends promissory note, increases borrowing limit
feed.summary: Trailblazer Merger Corp I (NASDAQ:TBMC) has amended its promissory note with Trailblazer Sponsor Group, LLC, increasing the borrowing limit by $250,000 to a total of $4,830,000. This development comes as the company's stock has declined by nearly 10% in the past week, and it continues to work towards its proposed merger with Cyabra Strategy Ltd. The company also faces a Nasdaq delisting notice and has extended its business combination deadline.

feed.title: A Look At DiamondRock Hospitality (DRH) Valuation After Upgrade Dividend Hike And Planned Nasdaq Move
feed.summary: DiamondRock Hospitality (DRH) is gaining investor attention following a Deutsche Bank upgrade, a 12.5% dividend increase, and an upcoming move to Nasdaq's Global Select Market. While the stock shows a 4.6% undervaluation with a fair value of US$9.75, its P/E ratio of 35x is higher than the industry average, suggesting it may be expensive relative to the broader sector but still cheaper than some peers. Investors are encouraged to consider the intrinsic value gap, P/E ratio tension, and potential risks like RevPAR softness or expense pressures in urban markets before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics buys Texas Pacific Land (TPL) share for $329
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a significant owner in Texas Pacific Land Corp (NYSE:TPL), purchased one share of common stock for $329.91 on January 14, 2026. This transaction increased their direct ownership to 3,487,692 shares. The purchase follows recent news about Texas Pacific Land Corporation missing Q3 2025 earnings estimates, announcing a partnership with Bolt Data & Energy, and a planned three-for-one stock split.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To BrightSpring Health Services (BTSG) Analyst Focus On Home-Based Care
feed.summary: BrightSpring Health Services (BTSG) has captured investor attention due to analyst focus on its growth prospects in integrated home-based care, serving Medicare, Medicaid, and insured populations. The company's recent US$304.5 million equity offering in June 2025 is seen as a way to fund growth in Pharmacy Solutions and Provider Services, impacting its investment narrative. While analysts are optimistic about home-based care expansion, investors are also considering the company's substantial leverage and the influence of government reimbursement policies.

feed.title: Dow Inc. (DOW) Stock Falls Amid Market Uptick: What Investors Need to Know
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (DOW) stock experienced a 1.13% decline, closing at $27.94, even as major market indices like the S&P 500, Dow, and Nasdaq saw gains. Despite this daily drop, Dow Inc. shares had achieved a 22.5% increase over the past month, outperforming both the Basic Materials sector and the S&P 500. Investors are anticipating the company's Q4 2025 earnings report on January 29, 2026, with analysts forecasting a revenue decrease and negative earnings per share for the full fiscal year.

feed.title: Us Foods Holding Corp stock hits all-time high at 85.11 USD
feed.summary: US Foods Holding Corp (USFD) stock has achieved an all-time high of $85.11, reflecting strong investor confidence and solid performance. Despite appearing slightly overvalued by InvestingPro data, analysts maintain a strong buy consensus with price targets up to $102. The company recently surpassed Q3 2025 earnings expectations and reaffirmed its fiscal year 2025 guidance.

feed.title: EQS-News: Klöckner & Co and Worthington Steel sign business combination agreement
feed.summary: Klöckner & Co and Worthington Steel have signed a business combination agreement, with Worthington Steel launching a voluntary public takeover offer for all Klöckner & Co shares at €11.00 per share. This represents a significant premium to Klöckner & Co's recent share prices. Both companies anticipate that their complementary strengths will foster sustainable growth and establish them as leading service center and metal processing entities in North America and Europe.

feed.title: Canadian oil stocks: Suncor named top pick by CIBC and RBC
feed.summary: Canadian oil stocks experienced a volatile start to 2026 due to uncertainties surrounding Venezuelan production and geopolitical events in Iran. Despite varied market movements, both RBC Capital Markets and CIBC Capital Markets have named Suncor Energy as a top pick among Canadian integrated oil producers, citing a more stable underlying landscape for fourth-quarter estimates. RBC also favors Canadian Natural Resources among non-integrated senior producers, while CIBC highlights Kelt Exploration and Tamarack Valley Energy.

feed.title: AnaptysBio (NASDAQ:ANAB) Stock Price Down 7.3% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: AnaptysBio (NASDAQ:ANAB) shares fell 7.3% despite a surprise quarterly beat and a $100 million share buyback authorization. The company remains unprofitable, with analysts forecasting negative EPS for the current fiscal year, and insiders have sold a significant number of shares recently. Analysts currently rate the stock a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $60.40.

feed.title: Mexican silver mine changes hands in $40M deal with bonus payouts
feed.summary: Endeavour Silver (NYSE: EXK) has completed the sale of its Bolañitos silver-gold mine to Guanajuato Silver for an upfront consideration of US$40 million, comprising US$30 million in cash and US$10 million in Guanajuato Silver shares. The deal also includes provisions for two contingent payments of US$5 million each, tied to future production milestones of silver-equivalent ounces from the mine. This divestiture allows Endeavour Silver to focus on its core silver assets and strategic growth initiatives.

feed.title: FDA tells Sanofi, GSK, AZ and CSL to include warnings for febrile seizures on flu shot labels
feed.summary: The FDA has mandated that Sanofi, AstraZeneca, GSK, and CSL Seqirus add warnings about the risk of febrile seizures to the labels of six of their flu vaccines. This decision follows postmarketing observational studies conducted by the FDA's Biologics Effectiveness and Safety System (BEST) which showed an increased risk of febrile seizures in children aged 6 months to 4 years within the first day of vaccination. The companies have 30 days to comply, propose changes, or rebut the findings, amidst increased scrutiny on vaccine policies and recent changes to childhood immunization schedules by the CDC.

feed.title: Daniel Asher Buys 57,809 Shares of Sequans Communications (NYSE:SQNS) Stock
feed.summary: Major shareholder Daniel Asher recently increased his stake in Sequans Communications (NYSE:SQNS) by purchasing 57,809 shares at an average price of $5.51 per share, following other acquisitions earlier in January. This transaction, totaling over $318,000, raised his total holdings to 1,789,487 shares, representing a 3.34% ownership increase. The company's stock is trading at $5.59, with a market capitalization of $80.03 million, and analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $10.83.

feed.title: Woodside Energy Group Ltd (NYSE:WDS) Short Interest Up 96.4% in December
feed.summary: Woodside Energy Group Ltd (NYSE:WDS) experienced a significant 96.4% increase in short interest during December, reaching 4,255,920 shares. This corresponds to a days-to-cover ratio of 3.3 days, with approximately 0.2% of the company's stock currently shorted. Analyst ratings are mixed, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus from MarketBeat, despite a recent downgrade to "sell" by Wall Street Zen and a "hold" from Weiss Ratings.

feed.title: Halper Sadeh LLC Encourages WEBTOON Entertainment Inc. Shareholders to Contact the Firm to Discuss Their Rights
feed.summary: Halper Sadeh LLC, an investor rights law firm, is investigating potential breaches of fiduciary duties by officers and directors of WEBTOON Entertainment Inc. (NASDAQ: WBTN). The firm encourages long-term shareholders to contact them to discuss possible corporate governance reforms, recovery of funds, or other benefits. Shareholder involvement is emphasized as a way to improve company practices and enhance shareholder value.

feed.title: Boston Scientific set to re-enter neurovascular market with Penumbra acquisition
feed.summary: Boston Scientific announced its acquisition of Penumbra for approximately $14.5 billion, marking its re-entry into the neurovascular market. This strategic move aims to expand Boston Scientific's vascular offerings with Penumbra's comprehensive portfolio of devices for treating cardiovascular diseases, stroke, and aneurysms. The acquisition is expected to be completed in 2026 and will initially be dilutive to Boston Scientific's adjusted earnings per share.

feed.title: Insider Sell: D Bidzos Sells 9,000 Shares of VeriSign Inc (VRSN)
feed.summary: D Bidzos, Executive Chairman, President, and CEO of VeriSign Inc (VRSN), recently sold 9,000 shares, reducing his total holdings to 412,099 shares. This transaction is part of a larger trend of insider selling at VeriSign, with 44 insider sells and 2 insider buys over the past year. VeriSign's stock is currently trading at $248.45, indicating it is fairly valued according to its GF Value.

feed.title: John Hennessy Sells 600 Shares of Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOG) Stock
feed.summary: John Hennessy, a director at Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOG), sold 600 shares of the company's stock on January 13th for a total of $202,512, reducing his holding by 2.75%. The transaction, disclosed in an SEC filing, occurred as Alphabet stock was trading around $333, with a market capitalization of $4.02 trillion. The article also highlights recent positive catalysts like Apple's adoption of Google's Gemini, alongside ongoing legal and operational challenges for the tech giant.

feed.title: Walmart Inc. (WMT) CEO Kathryn McLay to Depart by January 31
feed.summary: Kathryn McLay, CEO of Walmart International, is set to depart from her role on January 31, 2026, though she will assist with the transition during the first quarter. Walmart plans to announce her successor soon to ensure leadership continuity. McLay previously served as CEO of Sam's Club U.S. and held strategic roles within Walmart.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL) Director Sells 600 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Alphabet Director John Hennessy sold 600 shares of GOOGL stock for $202,512 on January 13th, reducing his stake by 2.75%. Despite the insider selling, Alphabet's stock traded down 0.9% to $332.78, with a market capitalization of $4.02 trillion, and the company recently surpassed quarterly EPS and revenue expectations. Near-term catalysts for Alphabet include strong AI momentum and device integrations for Gemini, though risks such as copyright litigation, data-center transmission constraints, and regulatory pressures persist.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Aeva Technologies (NASDAQ:AEVA) CFO Sells 60,000 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Aeva Technologies CFO Saurabh Sinha sold 60,000 shares of AEVA stock for approximately $1.24 million on January 15, significantly reducing his stake. This sale follows several others since November, totaling over 146,000 shares, while the company trades near $19.82 with a negative EPS and market cap of $1.19 billion. Analyst consensus for AEVA is currently a "Hold" rating with an average price target of $26.50.

feed.title: Truist expands equipment finance ops with new head of structured credit
feed.summary: Truist Financial Corp. has appointed Mark Cuccinello as head of structured credit to oversee asset-based lending, working capital solutions, and equipment finance. Cuccinello, previously from JPMorgan Chase, will advance Truist’s structured-credit strategy by collaborating with corporate and commercial banking teams. This appointment underscores Truist's commitment to investing in its wholesale banking platform and delivering sophisticated financial solutions.

feed.title: Aeva Technologies CFO Sinha sells $1.23m in stock
feed.summary: Aeva Technologies CFO Saurabh Sinha sold 59,300 shares of company stock across three transactions on January 15, 2026, totaling approximately $1.23 million. Following these sales, Sinha directly holds 627,756 shares. The article also highlights Aeva's recent technological advancements in AI data centers and autonomous vehicle LiDAR sensors.

feed.title: Major Investor Shakes Up Sharps Technology With Notable Stock Sale
feed.summary: Saba Capital Management, L.P., a major investor, has reduced its stake in Sharps Technology, Inc. (STSS) by selling 107,465 shares for $240,009. This sale follows recent governance concerns, including the resignation of an independent director due to potential conflicts of interest related to the company's digital asset treasury strategy and the involvement of executives' family members. These issues are contributing to a "sell-leaning technical sentiment" for the stock.

feed.title: Xcel Energy plans another round of power shutoffs impacting thousands of northern Colorado residents
feed.summary: Xcel Energy announced plans for another round of public safety power shutoffs (PSPS) in northern Colorado on Friday, affecting nearly 9,000 customers in Larimer and Weld counties due to extremely dry conditions and high fire danger. The utility's meteorologists have been monitoring the weather, and Xcel Energy communicated the impending shutoffs to strategic partners 74 hours out and to customers around 48 hours in advance. Local organizations like Serve 6.8 are preparing to assist vulnerable residents, while some community members, like Mark Waldo, are already prepared with generators.

feed.title: GE HealthCare Stock Under the Microscope: Solid Gains, Soft Momentum and a Cautiously Bullish Wall S
feed.summary: GE HealthCare has shown strong performance over the past year but its stock momentum has softened recently, leading to a nuanced decision for investors. Analysts generally hold a cautiously bullish stance, with price targets indicating moderate upside. The company's future performance hinges on global healthcare spending, the adoption of its digital ecosystem, and margin expansion.

feed.title: Is Amgen (AMGN) Still Attractive After A 26% One Year Share Price Gain
feed.summary: Amgen (AMGN) has seen a 26.5% share price increase over the last year, prompting a valuation analysis to determine its current attractiveness. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model suggests the stock is undervalued by 48.1% with an estimated intrinsic value of $636.19 per share. Furthermore, its P/E ratio of 25.37x is below its "Fair Ratio" of 27.23x, also indicating undervaluation, although investor sentiment is split between bullish and bearish narratives concerning future growth and market challenges.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Buying General Electric (GE) After Its Huge Multi‑Year Rally?
feed.summary: General Electric (GE) has seen significant share price appreciation over recent years, prompting questions about its current valuation. According to a Discounted Cash Flow analysis, GE appears 66.7% overvalued, with an estimated intrinsic value of US$191.98 compared to its current price of US$319.94. Its P/E ratio of 41.9x also suggests overvaluation when compared to its Fair Ratio of 37.3x, despite being in line with the Aerospace & Defense industry average.

feed.title: RBC Capital Sticks to Its Buy Rating for S&P Global (SPGI)
feed.summary: RBC Capital analyst Ashish Sabadra maintained a Buy rating on S&P Global (SPGI) with a price target of $620.00. The company's shares closed yesterday at $542.16. S&P Global recently reported strong quarterly results, with revenue of $3.89 billion and a net profit of $1.09 billion for the quarter ending September 30.

feed.title: Is Parker-Hannifin (PH) Pricing In Too Much After Strong Multi‑Year Share Gains
feed.summary: Parker-Hannifin (PH) has seen significant share gains, but a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is currently overvalued by approximately 39.3%. Its P/E ratio of 32.74x also indicates it's expensive compared to its proprietary "Fair Ratio" of 30.16x, raising questions about whether its recent performance is fully priced into the stock. The article recommends further investigation using valuation tools to assess its true worth.

feed.title: A Look At Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) Valuation After Recent Earnings Results
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) recently reported annual revenue of US$9.7 billion and net income of US$663.5 million. Despite a 13.5% decline in its one-year total shareholder return, the stock is considered undervalued by many analysts, with a fair value estimate of US$27.93 compared to its current price of US$22.87. This narrative is supported by expectations of improved cost discipline, higher margins, and future EPS growth from new capacity, though risks like high leverage and euro-denominated debt exist.

feed.title: Watts Water Technologies, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Release and Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Watts Water Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: WTS) will host a webcast on Thursday, February 12, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. EST to discuss its Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 financial results. The company will release these results after market close on Wednesday, February 11, 2026. Interested parties can access the webcast and an archived version on the Investor Relations section of the company's website, www.watts.com.

feed.title: Assessing Amkor Technology (AMKR) Valuation After Strong Multi‑Period Share Price Gains
feed.summary: Amkor Technology (AMKR) has seen significant share price gains over the past year and five years, prompting an assessment of its current valuation. The company's Price-to-Earnings ratio of 39.5x is considered fair compared to peers and industry averages, aligning closely with an estimated fair P/E of 40.7x. However, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model suggests the stock is trading well above its implied fair value of US$4.20, indicating a potential overvaluation despite positive P/E signals.

feed.title: Assessing VinFast Auto (VFS) Valuation After Strong 2025 Delivery Progress And Ambitious Global Targets
feed.summary: VinFast Auto (VFS) has reported strong preliminary EV deliveries for 2025, with global targets approaching 200,000 vehicles. Despite recent positive share price momentum, the stock has experienced a longer-term decline, leading to a discussion on its current valuation. While a "most popular narrative" suggests the stock is undervalued with a fair value of US$6.36, a look at its P/S ratio indicates it might be expensive compared to industry averages, prompting investors to consider if the current price already reflects its future growth potential.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Urges Bitdeer Technologies Group Investors to Act: Class Action Filed Alleging Investor Harm
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has filed a class action lawsuit against Bitdeer Technologies Group (NASDAQ: BTDR) and some of its officers, alleging violations of federal securities laws. The lawsuit seeks to recover damages for investors who purchased Bitdeer securities between June 6, 2024, and November 10, 2025. The firm claims Bitdeer made false and misleading statements regarding its SEALMINER A4 project and the readiness and mass production timeline of its SEAL04 chip.

feed.title: |Armstrong World Industries Appoints New CEO, Market Cap Nearly Quadrupled
feed.summary: |Armstrong World Industries has announced that current COO Mark Hershey will take over as CEO from Vic Grizzle, effective April 1, 2026. Under Grizzle's decade-long leadership, the company's market capitalization has almost quadrupled since 2016. Hershey, who has been instrumental in the company's strategic growth and led 14 acquisitions, is set to continue advancing Armstrong's market competitiveness and growth strategy.
